entity.summary: Former Blast MetaDEX and liquidity protocol that operated during 2024–2025, processed swap activity across standard and concentrated-liquidity pools, and later stopped development as the team moved to the successor project nest.
entity.notes: Current first-party retrospective site states that Fenix operated on Blast in 2024–2025, that work on Fenix stopped, and that the next chapter became nest, launched in 2026. Exact terminal date is not asserted, so status is inactive with death_date and death_reason left null. HEI consolidates standard-pool and concentrated-liquidity discovery rows under one Fenix Finance entity.

evidence.title: Fenix Finance retrospective
evidence.notes: Current first-party retrospective states that Fenix operated on Blast during 2024–2025, processed swap-pool volume and fees, and that the team stopped working on Fenix before moving to the next chapter.

evidence.title: Fenix Finance SDK
evidence.notes: First-party Fenix Finance SDK repository contains trade, pair, fraction, entity, and related exchange-library tests supporting the protocol's exchange implementation identity.

evidence.title: Fenix Finance DEX discovery entries
evidence.notes: June 2026 candidate corpus preserves Fenix Finance, concentrated-liquidity, and standard-pool source rows; HEI consolidates those representations into one historical exchange entity while first-party evidence controls current inactive status.
